dictionary_sections.definition: Unified Trawin Hamiltonian is a source-backed registry entry anchored by \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}[\psi,t]=\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{tunnel}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{ER}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{cymatic}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{SC}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{TZP}}.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: The unifix source is a LaTeX cleanup artifact for the unified Trawin Hamiltonian; this repair converts its Unicode Hamiltonian terms to stable LaTeX. The packet keeps the entry usable in the folder-local production layout while preserving review boundaries.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The repaired relation supplies a canonical equation, a source-specific symbol key, a Wolfram model, and a derivation chain for production preview.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: Source extraction; equation normalization; symbol-key grounding; TRAWIN closure compatibility.

dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: This packet converts malformed or empty registry material into a usable production section based on cited D-drive evidence.
dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus:
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=6pt,topsep=4pt]
\item Canonical carrier: the repaired mathematical relation used as the entry spine.
\item Source grounding: the D-drive file or row that supplies the relation.
\item TRAWIN closure: the interpretation through time, rotation, action, wave, integration, and normalization.
\end{enumerate}
dictionary_sections.encyclopedia_mathematica: A suitable visual should place the canonical relation at center, source operators as labeled inputs, and the equation-support progression as the lower derivation path.

derivation_layer.source_latex:
% BEGIN TZP DERIVATION LAYER
\tzpsection{Derivation Layer}
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt]
\item
\[
\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{tunnel}}=-\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_{\mathrm{eff}}}\nabla^2+V_{\mathrm{barrier}}(r,\theta,\phi,t)
\]
This relation is retained from the source-backed repair chain.
\item
\[
\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{ER}}=\int_{\Sigma}\sqrt{|g|}\,R^{\mu\nu}T_{\mu\nu}\,d^4x
\]
This relation is retained from the source-backed repair chain.
\item
\[
\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{TZP}}=\delta(r)|\mathrm{TZP}\rangle\langle\mathrm{TZP}|
\]
This relation is retained from the source-backed repair chain.
\item
\[
\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}[\psi,t]=\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{tunnel}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{ER}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{cymatic}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{SC}}+\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{TZP}}
\]
This relation is retained from the source-backed repair chain.
\end{enumerate}
% END TZP DERIVATION LAYER

proof_certificate.formal_status: Source-backed repaired packet is structurally admissible for folder-local production preview.
proof_certificate.physical_status: Interpretation remains tied to the cited source and is not an empirical validation claim.

wolfram.note: Carrier form preserves source LaTeX as Wolfram-readable data; semantic proof remains domain-specific.
